title: 3DTILES_content_conditional extension
description: Defines the structure of the extension object that is stored as the 3DTILES_content_conditional extension in a tileset JSON, and that summarizes the conditions that appear in the contents.

dimensions.description: The dimensions of the conditions, each consisting of the name and domain of the respective property.

name.description: The name of the property that is used for defining the condition, to be used as one of the keys in the conditional content array items.

keySet.description: The set of all values that appear in any condition.
